backend.changelog: Manifest schema v2 — sha256 field added per artifact. No functional changes to runtime; parser groundwork for Phase 2 auto-apply.

cadBridge.changelog: ADR-015 Phase 2 release. (1) SHA256 verify on Apply Update: agent now downloads from /api/downloads/CadBridge-Setup.zip?raw=true and hashes the bytes locally before letting Setup.bat touch anything; mismatch refuses to install. Legacy v1 manifest without sha256 degrades to warning-log + proceed (no regression for stale gateways). (2) De-elevate launched agent: Setup.ps1 now spawns the new agent at medium IL via a one-shot Scheduled Task (RunLevel=Limited), so the post-install tray runs at the same IL as the reboot-Startup-shortcut path -- ends the Task Manager 'Administrator' inconsistency.
